documentation: Intel OpenMP* Runtime Library x86_64 dynamic libraries for Linux*. Intel OpenMP* Runtime Library provides OpenMP API specification support in Intel® C Compiler, Intel® C++ Compiler and Intel® Fortran Compiler. It helps to improve performance by creating multithreaded software using shared memory and running on multi-core processor systems.
